Home / Analytics & Product Tracking / Plausible

Plausible — open source alternative

Lightweight, privacy-first Google Analytics alternative.

Strengths

  • No cookies — no consent banner needed.
  • Tiny script, fast page loads.
  • Clean, simple dashboard.

Weaknesses

  • Lighter feature set than GA4 (no funnels in free tier).
  • Retention limits on cloud tier.
  • Some goal-tracking requires plan upgrade.
License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 2/5 Hosted cloud option

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Plausible is used as an alternative to

Google Analytics

Google's free website and app analytics.

See all alternatives →

Mixpanel

Product analytics and funnels.

See all alternatives →
